suite.name: CURA APPT001

kw.name: Run Keywords
Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Appointment Workflow Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=combo_facility' by value Tokyo CURA Healthcare Center.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Unselect Checkbox
kw.doc: Removes the selection of checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select Radio Button
kw.doc: Sets the radio button group ``group_name`` to ``value``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=facility' contains text 'Tokyo CURA Healthcare Center'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: บันทึก: พบ Bug ระบบยอมให้จองวันที่ในอดีต
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Simulates the user clicking the back button on their browser.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ตรวจสอบการกด Back หลัง Logout สำเร็จ
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Open Login Page
kw.doc: เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.arg: description=กรณีระบุข้อมูลถูกต้องครบถ้วน

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Unselect Checkbox
kw.doc: Removes the selection of checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select Radio Button
kw.doc: Sets the radio button group ``group_name`` to ``value``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: บันทึก: พบ Bug ระบบยอมให้จองวันที่ในอดีต
kw.arg: บันทึก: พบ Bug ระบบยอมให้จองวันที่ในอดีต
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Simulates the user clicking the back button on their browser.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ตรวจสอบการกด Back หลัง Logout สำเร็จ
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

suite.doc: การทดสอบระบบจองคิว (Appointment Function) - CURA Healthcare

suite.name: CURA LOG001

kw.name: Run Keywords
Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจากไม่กรอกทั้ง Username และ Password

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=กรณีคลิกปุ่ม Login ซ้ำ โดยไม่ระบุข้อมูล

errors.msg: บันทึก: พบ Bug ระบบยอมให้จองวันที่ในอดีต
